title: juncus harae
intro: Juncus harae, also known as the 'Dwarf Rush', is a species of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. It is primarily found in wetland areas and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Juncus harae include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or a decoction to utilize its medicinal properties, although specific herbal preparation methods may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
